name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $5,000 with same-day approval and minimal documentation at their Atlanta location.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates a physical storefront location at 1919 Metropolitan Parkway SW in Atlanta, Georgia, offering fast cash loans to consumers who need emergency funds quickly. The company markets itself as accessible to all credit types and emphasizes minimal documentation requirements for loan approval. Their service hours are Monday-Friday 8:30am-8:30pm and Saturday-Sunday 9:30am-6:30pm, positioning themselves as a convenient walk-in option for time-sensitive financial needs.

The company offers multiple loan products ranging from $250 to $50,000, including payday loans (up to $1,000), cash advances (up to $1,000), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), and same-day loans. All products are marketed as unsecured loans available to borrowers regardless of credit history. They provide online application options and advertise same-day funding for approved applicants. The company emphasizes quick approval processes and claims to welcome all credit types without standard credit checks.

Superb Cash Advance distinguishes itself through flexible payment schedules and personalized repayment plans, according to customer reviews. Multiple reviewers mention the company's willingness to work with borrowers to create payment arrangements aligned with their budgets. The staff, particularly mentioned employee Helen, receives praise for making the process stress-free and straightforward. They also advertise second lien title loans as an available product option.

However, potential borrowers should note that payday loans and cash advances typically carry high interest rates and fees not disclosed on this website. The reviews, while positive, are dated (mostly 2+ years old) and some mention locations in Arvada rather than the Atlanta address listed, raising questions about review authenticity. The company's lack of transparent APR, fee, and term information on their website is a significant red flag for consumer protection. Borrowers should carefully review all terms before accepting any loan agreement.
address: 1716 Military Pkwy suite f, Mesquite, TX 75149

company_info.headquarters: 1716 Military Pkwy suite f, Mesquite, TX 75149

pros: Same-day approval and funding available for qualified applicants
Accepts all credit types without hard credit checks
Loan amounts up to $5,000 available for online applications
Flexible and personalized payment schedules tailored to individual budgets
Minimal documentation required for quick approval process
Convenient physical location with extended hours (8:30am-8:30pm weekdays, 9:30am-6:30pm weekends)
Staff described as professional, friendly, and helpful in customer reviews
cons: Website does not disclose APR, interest rates, or fee structures for any loan products
Customer reviews are dated (mostly 2+ years old) with some referencing different locations, raising authenticity concerns
Payday and cash advance loans typically carry high costs not transparent on this website; borrowers may face debt cycles
No information provided about credit building assistance or financial counseling resources
Limited transparency about loan terms, repayment periods, and total cost of borrowing
best_for: Consumers with poor credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours
Borrowers seeking unsecured loans without traditional credit checks
People in urgent financial situations who can visit the physical location in Atlanta
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for people in immediate financial emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans and need cash within hours, particularly those with poor credit. The critical caveat is that the website completely omits APR and fee information—borrowers must visit in person or call (404) 994-3414 to learn the actual cost of borrowing, and high-cost payday loans can trap consumers in debt cycles if not used carefully.
services: Quick installment loans with flexible payment schedules
